description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a gable roof, surrounded by lush green trees on both sides and a paved driveway leading to a carport. The front facade features a prominent triangular gable, a large window above the entryway, and a small porch with a white railing. The house has a mix of large and small windows, some with flower boxes, and a visible outdoor seating area on the side. The rear and side views reveal a rooftop terrace with outdoor furniture and additional greenery. The exterior is primarily red brick, complemented by white trim and gray roofing materials. The landscaping includes mature trees that provide shade and privacy to the property.
description: A two-story red brick house with a gable roof, surrounded by mature trees, a paved driveway, and a small front porch with white railing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick wall, rooftop terrace, and dense tree coverage obscuring much of the lower structure.
description_view_1: Front view with the main entryway, carport, paved driveway, porch, and symmetrical trees flanking the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the rooftop terrace, outdoor seating, and thick tree canopy covering the side of the house.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back brick wall, upper-level windows, and partial view of the rooftop terrace and interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, white railing, and steps leading from a paved driveway, flanked by decorative plants.
